name: Mary Joestar
alt_names: メアリー・ジョースタ
description:
Mary Joestar is the late mother of Jonathan Joestar and wife of George Joestar. Never shown in person in the series, the only thing known about her story is that she accompanied her husband during a trip to London and died protecting her baby when her carriage had an accident and fell into a ravine.

(Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia)
